suite.name: Api Tests

test.name: Mobile App Can Register A New Attendee

kw.name: Create Session
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=crowd_api, url=http://web:8000, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=False, debug=0

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.
kw.msg: POST Request : url=http://web:8000/api/register-attendee/ path_url=/api/register-attendee/ headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Content-Length': '113'} body=b'{"event_id": "4", "name": "Robot User", "phone": "1122334455", "email": "robot2@example.com", "accompanies": "0"}'

test.doc: Simulates a mobile app sending a POST request to register a user.

suite.doc: Integration tests for the Crowd Density APIs
